domains.name: Domain 1: Fundamentals of AI and ML
Domain 5: Security, Compliance, and Governance for AI Solutions

questions.text: The DevOps team is automating releases and must train and deploy custom ML models with managed infrastructure. Which design fits best? train and deploy custom ML models with managed infrastructure.
questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to label raw data for supervised learning at scale. Which solution is BEST? label raw data for supervised learning at scale.
questions.explanation: Ground Truth helps create labeled datasets using human and automated labeling.

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must run batch inference on large datasets without managing servers. What should they do FIRST? run batch inference on large datasets without managing servers.
questions.explanation: Batch Transform runs predictions on large datasets asynchronously.

questions.text: A company needs to store and version ML model artifacts. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? store and version ML model artifacts.
questions.explanation: Model Registry catalogs models for approval and deployment workflows.

questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to perform time-series forecasting with AutoML capabilities. Which solution is BEST? perform time-series forecasting with AutoML capabilities.
questions.explanation: SageMaker Autopilot and Canvas support low-code ML including forecasting use cases.

questions.text: The DevOps team is automating releases and must classify images with a pre-trained API without building models. Which design fits best? classify images with a pre-trained API without building models.

options.text: Amazon OpenSearch Service or Aurora pgvector

questions.explanation: Rekognition provides pre-built computer vision APIs.

questions.text: An audit found gaps: the organization must convert text to lifelike speech. Which option addresses this? convert text to lifelike speech.
questions.explanation: Polly is a text-to-speech service.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must extract text and data from scanned documents. What is the recommended approach? extract text and data from scanned documents.
questions.explanation: Textract uses ML to read forms and tables from documents.

questions.text: An audit found gaps: the organization must discover insights and relationships in unstructured text. Which option addresses this? discover insights and relationships in unstructured text.
questions.explanation: Comprehend is a natural language processing (NLP) service.

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must translate text between languages at scale. What should they do FIRST? translate text between languages at scale.
questions.explanation: Translate provides neural machine translation.

questions.text: The DevOps team is automating releases and must search for similar vectors in embedding datasets. Which design fits best? search for similar vectors in embedding datasets.

options.text: Amazon OpenSearch Service or Aurora pgvector

questions.explanation: Vector search supports similarity queries for embeddings in search engines or databases.

questions.text: A company needs to orchestrate ML pipelines with repeatable steps. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? orchestrate ML pipelines with repeatable steps.
questions.explanation: SageMaker Pipelines automates end-to-end ML workflows.

questions.text: Which service should you use to train and deploy custom ML models with managed infrastructure?
questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.explanation: SageMaker provides end-to-end ML building, training, and deployment.

questions.text: Which service should you use to label raw data for supervised learning at scale?
questions.explanation: Ground Truth helps create labeled datasets using human and automated labeling.

questions.text: What is the MOST appropriate AWS solution to label raw data for supervised learning at scale?
questions.explanation: Ground Truth helps create labeled datasets using human and automated labeling.

questions.text: While troubleshooting latency, engineers determine they must access foundation models from multiple providers through one API. Which action is appropriate? access foundation models from multiple providers through one API.

options.text: Amazon Titan Embeddings or Cohere Embed on Bedrock

questions.explanation: Bedrock offers FMs from Amazon and partners via a unified API.

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must invoke models for text generation with on-demand throughput. What should they do FIRST? invoke models for text generation with on-demand throughput.
questions.explanation: Bedrock supports on-demand and provisioned throughput for inference.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must customize a foundation model with labeled examples for a specific task. What is the recommended approach? customize a foundation model with labeled examples for a specific task.

options.text: Amazon Titan Embeddings or Cohere Embed on Bedrock

questions.explanation: Fine-tuning adapts FMs using your domain-specific data.

questions.text: A company needs to compare latency and quality across foundation models in a playground. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? compare latency and quality across foundation models in a playground.

options.text: Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management or similar versioning patterns
Model evaluation in Amazon Bedrock or SageMaker

questions.explanation: Playgrounds let you experiment with prompts and models.

questions.text: An audit found gaps: the organization must generate images from text prompts using AWS generative AI. Which option addresses this? generate images from text prompts using AWS generative AI.

options.text: Amazon Titan Image Generator or Stability AI models in Bedrock
Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management or similar versioning patterns

questions.explanation: Bedrock supports image generation models for creative workloads.

questions.text: A company needs to understand tokens as billing units for generative models. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? understand tokens as billing units for generative models.

options.text: Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management or similar versioning patterns

questions.explanation: Generative models often bill per input/output tokens.

questions.text: While troubleshooting latency, engineers determine they must reduce hallucinations by grounding responses in private data. Which action is appropriate? reduce hallucinations by grounding responses in private data.

options.text: Amazon Titan Image Generator or Stability AI models in Bedrock

questions.explanation: RAG retrieves relevant documents before the model generates an answer.

questions.text: A company needs to store prompt templates and versions for teams. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? store prompt templates and versions for teams.

options.text: Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management or similar versioning patterns

questions.explanation: Managing prompts as code/templates improves consistency and governance.

questions.explanation: Systematic evaluation compares models and prompts against benchmarks.
